data.desc:
In the laning phase, harass enemies with Valir's 1st Skill
until their HP is low, then cast his 2nd Skill to push them back and follow up immediately with his 1st Skill for burst damage.
data.title: LANING COMBOS

data.desc: In teamfights, engage using Martis' 1st Skill to gather enemies and slow them, then use his 2nd Skill to deal damage and knock them airborne, and continue with Basic Attacks. Finish enemies at low HP with his Ultimate, then chain more kills with the Ultimate.
data.title: TEAMFIGHT COMBOS

data.desc: In the laning phase, initiate with Martis' 1st Skill to gather enemies and slow them, then follow up with his 2nd Skill. Use his 2nd Skill again to stay on the enemy and knock them airborne, and continue attacking with Basic Attacks.
data.title: LANING COMBOS

data.desc: Uranus should use his 2nd Skill to enter the fight, then his Ultimate to survive under enemy attacks while spamming his 1st Skill for sustained damage.
data.title: TEAMFIGHT COMBOS

data.desc: Uranus can use his 1st Skill to poke the enemy, then use the 2nd Skill - 1st Skill combo when their HP is low to finish them off.
data.title: LANING COMBOS

data.desc: In teamfights, start with Hanabi's 2nd Skill to slow the enemies, then follow up with her Ultimate to immobilize them and let loose with Basic Attacks. During this time, use her 1st Skill accordingly for more damage and survivability, and keep up the damage with her bouncing Basic Attacks.
data.title: TEAMFIGHT COMBOS

data.desc: In the laning phase, use Hanabi's 2nd Skill to poke the enemy and mark them, and continue to chip away their HP with Basic Attack bounces before using her 1st Skill and engaging them head-on.
data.title: LANING COMBOS

data.desc: In teamfights, get the shield from Chang'e's 2nd Skill, then use her 1st Skill to poke enemies, and follow up with her Ultimate if the 1st Skill was on target. Chang'e needs to move around during her Ultimate to keep herself safe and make sure the meteors can hit the target.
data.title: TEAMFIGHT COMBOS

data.desc: In the laning phase, get the buff from Chang'e's 2nd Skill first, then mark the enemy with her Basic Attacks. Cast her 1st Skill to slow down low HP enemy, and finish them off with her Ultimate.
data.title: LANING COMBOS

data.desc: In teamfights, look for opportunities to use Kaja's Ultimate to suppress an important target, then use his 2nd Skill to pull them into his team and finish them off with his 1st Skill.
data.title: TEAMFIGHT COMBOS

data.desc: In the laning phase, use Kaja's enhanced Basic Attacks and 1st Skill to wear down the enemy while stacking paralyze. Look for a chance to grab the enemy with Kaja's Ultimate then use his 2nd Skill to pull them out of position and into the bombs left by the 2nd Skill.
data.title: LANING COMBOS

data.desc: Stay in Elven Form to cast her 1st and 2nd skill combo to catch the enemy hero in distance. Then cast her Ultimate to enter her Abyssal Form. Follow with her 2nd and 1st skill combo to close in and finish off the target, then cast her 2nd Skill to dash away.
data.title: TEAMFIGHT COMBOS

data.desc: Elven Form Selena can use her 2nd Skill to stun the enemy, then use her 1st Skill to poke enemies and deal damage.
data.title: LANING COMBOS

data.desc: In teamfights, Use Aldous' Ultimate to gain vision on the enemy team, then use his Ultimate again to dash to the most vulnerable target. After the dash, use Aldous' 1st and 2nd skill combo to hit the enemy with his enhanced Basic Attacks.
data.title: TEAMFIGHT COMBOS

data.desc:
In the laning phase, Use Aldous' 1st Skill to enhance his next Basic Attack,
then his 2nd Skill to close in on the enemy to hit them with his enhanced attack. Follow with another 1st Skill to hit the enemy with another enhanced Basic Attack.
data.title: LANING COMBOS

data.desc: In teamfights, Claude should use his 1st Skill to stack up his buff first, and look for the best opportunities to get close to enemies with his 2nd Skill, and then use his Ultimate to finish them off.
data.title: TEAMFIGHT COMBOS

data.desc: In the laning phase, Claude can use his 1st Skill to poke the enemy, and use his 2nd Skill to close in on them when their HP is low, then use his Ultimate to kill them.
data.title: LANING COMBOS

data.desc: In teamfights, use Vale's 2nd Skill to knock a line of enemies airborne, then follow up with his Ultimate and 1st Skill for a devastating combo.
data.title: TEAMFIGHT COMBOS

data.desc: In the laning phase, use Vale's 2nd Skill to knock the opponent airborne, then follow up with his 1st Skill for damage.
data.title: LANING COMBOS

data.desc: In teamfights, Leomord can cast his Ultimate, then his 1st and 2nd Skills while Barbiel is moving towards him. After mounting, Leomord can use his mounted 1st Skill, 2nd Skill, and Basic Attacks to continue dishing out damage.
data.title: TEAMFIGHT COMBOS

data.desc:
Poke and zone out enemies with his 1st Skill while clearing minions.
When the enemy's HP is close to his Passive's threshold,
charge in with his 2nd Skill and finish them off with Basic Attacks.
data.title: LANING COMBOS

data.desc: In the laning phase, use Lunox's 3rd Skill to slow the opponent and her 2nd Skill to poke. When she takes damage, use her 1st Skill to heal back up.
data.title: LANING COMBOS

data.desc: In teamfights, use Lunox's 3rd Skill to slow enemies first and follow up with her 2nd Skill to gain the Power of Chaos, then activate her Darkening Ultimate and spam her 2nd Skill for a lot of damage. Afterwards, use her 1st Skill to gain the Power of Order, then activate her Brilliance Ultimate to become invincible and deal damage to nearby enemies.
data.title: TEAMFIGHT COMBOS

data.desc: Hanzo should activate his Ultimate from a safe position and engage as Hanekage. Use his 2nd Skill to dash in and knock enemies Airborne, then use his Black Mist and Basic Attacks to quickly stack his Passive and use his 1st Skill for maximum damage.
data.title: TEAMFIGHT COMBOS

data.desc: When ganking, Hanzo can use his 2nd Skill to close the distance, then stack his Passive with Basic Attacks and unleash his 1st Skill at max stacks for hefty damage. In teamfights, Hanzo should activate his Ultimate from a safe position and engage as Hanekage. Use his 2nd Skill to dash in and knock enemies Airborne, then use his Black Mist and Basic Attacks to quickly stack his Passive and use his 1st Skill for maximum damage.
data.title: LANING COMBOS

data.desc: In the laning phase, use Belerick's 2nd Skill to close the distance with the opponent and slow them with his enhanced Basic Attack, then follow up with his 1st Skill to CC them.
data.title: LANING COMBOS

data.desc: In teamfights, charge into the enemy formation with Belerick's 2nd Skill and taunt as many targets as possible with his Ultimate, then follow up with his 1st Skill to keep them taunted.
data.title: TEAMFIGHT COMBOS

data.desc: In teamfights, Kimmy can initiate with her Ultimate to group up enemies, then follow up with her 2nd Skill to immobilize them, and finish with her enhanced Basic Attacks for lots of damage. If enemies try to counter by closing in on Kimmy, use her 1st Skill to retreat.
data.title: TEAMFIGHT COMBOS

data.desc: In the laning phase, Build up Starlium before engaging. Use her 1st Skill to quickly close in on the opponent, then use her 2nd Skill to immobilize them before unleashing her enhanced Basic Attacks for great damage.
data.title: LANING COMBOS

data.desc: In teamfights, use Thamuz's 1st Skill to speed up and adjust positioning, then jump into the crowd using his 2nd Skill. Activate his Ultimate followed by a Basic Attack and his 1st Skill, and retrieve the Scythes before continuing with Basic Attacks.
data.title: TEAMFIGHT COMBOS

data.desc: In the laning phase, use Thamuz's 1st Skill, then leap to enemy using his 2nd Skill, causing his Scythes to return and resetting the CD of his 1st Skill. Follow up with a Basic Attack and then his 1st Skill, and tap the skill again to retrieve the Scythes and end with Basic Attacks.
data.title: LANING COMBOS

data.desc:
In teamfights, first use Harith's 2nd Skill to get close to the enemy,
then follow up with the Ultimate, and start spamming his 1st and 2nd Skill.
Dashing through the Ultimate not only reduces his skill cooldowns, but also allows Harith to get multiple enhanced Basic Attacks from his 2nd Skill.
data.title: TEAMFIGHT COMBOS

data.desc: In the laning phase, approach the enemy with Harith's 2nd Skill, hit them with an enhanced Basic Attack, then use his 1st Skill to chip away their HP.
data.title: LANING COMBOS

data.desc: In teamfights, Minsitthar should use his 1st Skill to pull in multiple enemies before using his Ultimate to restrict their movement, and then use his 2nd Skill's enhanced Basic Attacks to deal AOE damage.
data.title: TEAMFIGHT COMBOS

data.desc: In the laning phase, Minsitthar should use his 1st Skill to pull the enemy to him and slow them with his 2nd Skill, before unleashing his enhanced Basic Attacks.
data.title: LANING COMBOS

data.desc: In teamfights, target the enemy's backline with Kadita's 1st Skill, and use her 2nd Skill when passing through enemies to knock them airborne. Follow up with her Ultimate for massive damage and avoid all incoming damage while being untargetable.
data.title: TEAMFIGHT COMBOS

data.desc: In the laning phase, use Kadita's 1st Skill to constantly harass enemies, and look for opportunities to use her 2nd Skill.
data.title: LANING COMBOS

data.desc: In teamfights, use Faramis' Ultimate to protect his allies, then get close to the enemy and apply Nether Marks with his 1st Skill. Activate the 1st Skill again to pull them over and follow up with his 2nd Skill for additional damage.
data.title: TEAMFIGHT COMBOS

data.desc:
In the laning phase, use Faramis' 1st Skill to get close to the enemy
and hit them with his 2nd Skill while applying a Nether Mark with the 1st Skill. Then, use his 1st Skill again to pull the enemy back to him.
data.title: LANING COMBOS

data.desc: In teamfights, use Badang's 2nd Skill when the enemy is grouped up to trap multiple targets in the barrier, and unleash his Ultimate to repeatedly knock them into it for massive damage. Then use his 1st Skill and Basic Attacks to continue the onslaught.
data.title: TEAMFIGHT COMBOS

data.desc: In the laning phase, use Badang's 1st Skill to whittle down the enemy's HP. Use his 2nd Skill to trap the enemy, then use his 1st Skill to knock them into the barrier to stun them, and finish with Basic Attacks.
data.title: LANING COMBOS

data.desc: In teamfights, Khufra should open with his 1st Skill, then his Ultimate for area control, follow up with his 2nd Skill to prevent the enemy from escaping with their dash or blink skills.
data.title: TEAMFIGHT COMBOS

data.desc: In the laning phase, Khufra uses his 1st Skill to aim while charging before launching himself to CC the enemy target. He then deals damage and slows the target with his enhanced Basic Attack and follows up with his 2nd Skill to keep the target slowed.
data.title: LANING COMBOS

data.desc: In the laning phase, use Granger's 1st Skill to poke the enemy. When his energy gets low, use his 2nd Skill to replenish it and continue to poke with his 1st Skill.
data.title: LANING COMBOS

data.desc: In teamfights, use Granger's Ultimate to poke from a safe distance and continue the attack with his 1st Skill. When the 1st Skill ends, use his Ultimate again for more damage and to reposition. If enemies get close, use his 2nd Skill to create distance and continue dealing damage with his 1st Skill.
data.title: TEAMFIGHT COMBOS

data.desc: In teamfights, Guinevere can use her 2nd Skill to knock the enemy team airborne and follow with her Ultimate to deal damage while keeping them airborne. She can then use the dash of her 2nd Skill to dodge the incoming damage, or she can choose to use her 1st Skill to deal more damage for a full damage combo.
data.title: TEAMFIGHT COMBOS

data.desc: In the laning phase, Guinevere should use her 1st Skill and her enhanced Basic Attacks to clear out the Minions and poke enemy heroes. When enemy heroes' HP is low, user Guinevere's 2nd Skill to close in on them and knock them airborne. Follow up with her Ultimate to try to finish them off.
data.title: LANING COMBOS

data.desc: In teamfights, enter the fight using Esmeralda's Ultimate, then use her 1st Skill to gain Movement Speed and steal the shields of nearby enemies, before finishing them off with her 2nd Skill and Basic Attacks.
data.title: TEAMFIGHT COMBOS

data.desc: In the laning phase, use Esmeralda's 1st Skill to approach the enemy and hit them with her 2nd Skill followed by Basic Attacks. Her 1st Skill should be up again soon thanks to the CD reduction from her 2nd Skill, so use her 1st Skill again for Movement Speed and shields, and continue using her 2nd Skill and Basic Attacks.
data.title: LANING COMBOS

data.desc: In teamfights, Terizla can open with his Ultimate and his 1st Skill to control the enemy team, then use his 2nd Skill to repeatedly hit the targets pulled by the Scaffold.
data.title: TEAMFIGHT COMBOS

data.desc: In the laning phase, Terizla can use his 1st Skill to slow the enemy, then his 2nd Skill to repeatedly deal damage to them.
data.title: LANING COMBOS

data.desc: In teamfights, cast X.Borg's 1st Skill, then activate his Ultimate when enemies are clustered, and uses his 2nd Skill to pull them back to him.
data.title: TEAMFIGHT COMBOS

data.desc: In the laning phase, cast X.Borg's 1st Skill then use his 2nd Skill to pull enemies toward him.
data.title: LANING COMBOS

data.desc: In teamfights, Ling should move onto the wall with his 1st Skill, then use his 2nd Skill to land on enemy back-row heroes. Once landed, Ling should attack the target heroes with his Basic Attacks, and then cast his Ultimate to avoid incoming damage. He should then follow his targets when in the air to deal damage and knock them airborne. He can then dash with his 2nd Skill between the Tempest Blades to reset its cooldown and restore Lightness Points.
data.title: TEAMFIGHT COMBOS

data.desc: In the laning phase, Ling should use his 1st Skill to leap onto the wall, and strike down with his 2nd Skill to deal damage to the target enemy and slow them. Follow up with Ling's Basic Attacks and his 2nd Skill to chase down the enemy hero.
data.title: LANING COMBOS

data.desc: In teamfights, Dyrroth should use his 2nd Skill to close the gap with the enemy, then use his Basic Attacks and 1st Skill to deal damage, and finish off the low HP heroes with his Ultimate.
data.title: TEAMFIGHT COMBOS

data.desc: In the laning phase, Dyrroth can use his 2nd Skill to close in on the enemy and cast it again to lower their Physical Defense. He can then follow up with his Basic Attacks and 1st Skill to poke them.
data.title: LANING COMBOS

data.desc: Use Lylia's 2nd Skill to hit the opponent, then use her 1st Skill to detonate the Shadow Energy for a significant burst of damage. Continue to throw her 2nd Skill at the enemy and detonate it with Gloom.
data.title: LANING COMBOS

data.desc: Use Lylia's 2nd Skill multiple times to cover a large area with Shadow Energy, then detonate a chain reaction with her 1st Skill. Continue to spam Lylia's 2nd Skill and detonate with Gloom to quickly set off multiple explosions at once. When in danger, use Lylia's Ultimate to return to safety and recover.
data.title: TEAMFIGHT COMBOS

data.desc: In teamfights, first activate Baxia's 1st Skill, then use his Ultimate to speed up. After running into an enemy, use his 2nd Skill followed by Basic Attacks to deal damage.
data.title: TEAMFIGHT COMBOS

data.desc: In the laning phase, roll into the enemy with Baxia's 1st Skill and follow up with his 2nd Skill and Basic Attacks.
data.title: LANING COMBOS

data.desc: In the laning phase, use Masha's 1st Skill to close the gap with the enemy and slow them with her 2nd Skill to engage. Follow up with Basic Attacks for more damage.
data.title: LANING COMBOS

data.desc: In teamfights, charge into an enemy with Masha's Ultimate, then use her 1st Skill followed by Basic Attacks to deal more damage. Whenever she loses an HP bar, use her Ultimate again to charge at the target and slow them with her 2nd Skill.
data.title: TEAMFIGHT COMBOS

data.desc: In teamfights, use Basic Attacks to dash with her Passive and adjust position for damage, and then land as many hits as possible with her 1st Skill. After hitting all Weaknesses, reap kills with her Ultimate.
data.title: TEAMFIGHT COMBOS

data.desc:
In the laning phase, Wanwan can poke enemies with her 1st Skill
and then use Basic Attacks to dash with her Passive and adjust Swallow Daggers' paths to control enemies. After hitting an enemy's three Weaknesses, she can finish them off with her Ultimate.
data.title: LANING COMBOS

data.desc:
In teamfights,
Silvanna can control back-row enemies with her [ULTIMATE]
and then stun them with her [1st Skill].
Finally, she can deal damage with her [2nd Skill] and Basic Attacks.
data.title: TEAMFIGHT COMBOS

data.desc:
Silvanna can poke enemies with her [2nd Skill]
and use her 1st Skill to close the distance once they're low on HP.
Then, she can control them and finish them off with her [ULTIMATE].
data.title: LANING COMBOS

data.desc: In teamfights, initiate with Cecilion's Ultimate to slow the enemy, then hit them with his 1st Skill. When the time is right, pull the enemies together using his 2nd Skill and spam his 1st Skill for damage.
data.title: TEAMFIGHT COMBOS

data.desc: In the laning phase, use Cecilion's 2nd Skill to pull enemies together, then repeatedly hit them with his 1st Skill.
data.title: LANING COMBOS

data.desc: In the laning phase, use Carmilla's 2nd Skill to get close to the opponent, then use her 1st Skill and stick to them to deal continuous damage.
data.title: LANING COMBOS

data.desc: In teamfights, use Carmilla's Ultimate to engage and slow enemies, then use her 2nd Skill to get close and CC a target, and follow up with her 1st Skill for continuous AOE damage.
data.title: TEAMFIGHT COMBOS

data.desc: In teamfights, use Atlas's 2nd Skill to approach the enemy and unleash his Ultimate when multiple enemies are in range. Aim while channeling and release to slam them down near your team, then continue to deal damage with his 1st Skill.
data.title: TEAMFIGHT COMBOS

data.desc: In the laning phase, use Atlas's 2nd Skill to eject and then get close to the enemy. Right before the Mecha Sentry reaches Atlas, use his 1st Skill to double the effect.
data.title: LANING COMBOS

data.desc:
In teamfights, boost Attack Speed with their Ultimate
and control enemies with the enhanced 1st Skill for heavy damage. When enemies are close, use the enhanced 2nd Skill for protection.
data.title: TEAMFIGHT COMBOS

data.desc:
In the laning phase, poke enemies with the 1st Skill
and get more Attack Speed with their Ultimate when enemies are low on HP. Then control and kill the enemies with the enhanced 1st Skill.
data.title: LANING COMBOS

data.desc: In teamfights, open with Yu Zhong's Ultimate and run into the enemy's formation while knocking them around. When the enemy's backline heroes are exposed, use his Ultimate again to enter Dragonoid Form, and unleash his combo starting with his 2nd Skill then 3rd Skill, then 1st Skill to deal tons of damage. Finally, use the enhanced Basic Attack from his 2nd Skill to finish off the enemy.
data.title: TEAMFIGHT COMBOS

data.desc: In the laning phase, use Yu Zhong's 2nd Skill to slow the enemy and leap on them using his 3rd Skill. When repositioning with the dash of his 3rd Skill, cast his 1st Skill to hit the enemy with the outer edge, and follow up with the enhanced Basic Attack from his 2nd Skill and finish the combo with a Sha Residue eruption.
data.title: LANING COMBOS

data.desc: In teamfights, use Luo Yi's 1st Skill to mark the enemy with a Yin/Yang Sigil and use it again on another nearby enemy to apply the opposite Sigil and trigger a Yin-Yang Reaction. Then repeat the process. If there is only one enemy, use Luo Yi's 2nd Skill to trigger Yin-Yang Reactions.
data.title: TEAMFIGHT COMBOS

data.desc: In the laning phase, use Luo Yi's 1st Skill to mark the enemy with a Yin/Yang Sigil, then use her 2nd Skill to summon Fire of Yang or Aqua of Yin in range of the target to trigger a Yin-Yang Reaction.
data.title: LANING COMBOS

data.desc: In teamfights, use Swordout Slash to get close to the enemy, then use Benedetta's Ultimate where the enemy is clustered, and follow up with her 1st Skill for additional damage and 2nd Skill to block incoming CC.
data.title: TEAMFIGHT COMBOS

data.desc: In the laning phase, gather Sword Intent by holding Benedetta's Basic Attack button, then use Swordout Slash after Sword Intent is maxed to strike the enemy. Follow up with her 1st Skill and try to max out Sword Intent again by blocking the enemy's attack with her 2nd Skill, then end the combo with another Swordout Slash.
data.title: LANING COMBOS

data.desc: In the laning phase, move around to fill up Khaleed's Desert Power first, then hit the opponent with the enhanced Basic Attack to slow them and follow up with 3 hits from his 1st Skill. This should fill up his Desert Power again, allowing for another enhanced Basic Attack.
data.title: LANING COMBOS

data.desc: In teamfights, use Khaleed's Ultimate to initiate, then hit a target with his enhanced Basic Attack and continue the attack with his 1st Skill. Once Desert Power is full again, use another Basic Attack. Then use Khaleed's 2nd Skill to recover HP and reduce incoming damage.
data.title: TEAMFIGHT COMBOS

data.desc: In teamfights, use Barats' 1st Skill to maintain Big Guy stacks. Approach the enemy and use his 2nd Skill to push them close before using his Ultimate to minimize their chance of escape, then finish them off with Basic Attacks.
data.title: TEAMFIGHT COMBOS

data.desc: In the laning phase, spam Barats' low Mana cost 1st Skill to build Big Guy stacks while slowing and poking the enemy. Use his 2nd Skill to push the enemy to him and hit them with Basic Attacks.
data.title: LANING COMBOS

data.desc: Brody should prioritize using his 1st Skill and Basic Attack, to apply Abyss Marks on enemy heroes outside of the battle area. He can then use his Ultimate and Basic Attack to deal heavy damage and his 2nd Skill and Basic Attack to chase down enemies on the run.
data.title: TEAMFIGHT COMBOS

data.desc: Brody can regularly use his 1st Skill and Basic Attacks to clear lanes and poke the enemy heroes. Once enemy heroes are low on HP, Brody can use his 2nd Skill to close in and stun them, then cast his Ultimate to try to finish them off.
data.title: LANING COMBOS

data.desc: In teamfights, use Yve's Ultimate to cover as many enemies as possible and unleash multiple attacks on them. When the enemies run out of Yve's Ultimate, cancel it and use her 2nd Skill to slow them, then finish them off with her 1st Skill.
data.title: TEAMFIGHT COMBOS

data.desc: In the laning phase, use Yve's 2nd Skill to first slow the enemy from afar, then hit them with the center of her 1st Skill.
data.title: LANING COMBOS

data.desc:
In teamfights, first activate Mathilda's 1st skill,
then immediately use her 2nd Skill to get to a good position to initiate from
and unleash her Ultimate on the primary target. This combo allows Mathilda to quickly CC a key enemy hero, and lets an ally follow up by using Guiding Wind from her 2nd Skill.
data.title: TEAMFIGHT COMBOS

data.desc:
In the laning phase, use Mathilda's 1st Skill in advance and keep moving to gather wisps, then use her 2nd Skill to get close to the enemy
and unleash all her wisps at the target before ending with an enhanced Basic Attack. Use her Ultimate to secure the kill if the enemy is low on HP.
data.title: LANING COMBOS

data.desc: In teamfights, Paquito can use his 2nd Skill to approach the enemy team, then his 1st Skill to deal damage. He should follow up with his Ultimate to knock the enemy back and enter the Champ Stance. He can finish with his enhanced 2nd Skill to deal heavy damage to the enemies.
data.title: TEAMFIGHT COMBOS

data.desc: In the laning phase, Paquito can use his 1st Skill to gain a stack for the Champ Stance before using his 2nd Skill to close in on the enemy hero. He can use his 1st Skill again to deal damage and enter the Champ Stance. He should then hit the enemy hero with the enhanced 2nd Skill.
data.title: LANING COMBOS

data.desc: In teamfights, Gloo can use his 1st + 2nd skill combo to close in on the enemy and immobilize them. Then his 1st Skill and Ultimate to add more Sticky stacks to enemy heroes, and attach himself with his Ultimate to the enemy hero with max Sticky stacks. Once ready, Gloo can use the combo to deal damage and move the host out of position. Finally, he can use the refreshed 1st Skill and his Basic Attacks to finish off the host.
data.title: TEAMFIGHT COMBOS

data.desc: In the laning phase, Gloo should use his 1st Skill to attack the target enemy and create a Goo, then he can use his 2nd Skill to target the Goo to bring the target to its location and trigger an explosion. Touching the Goo will also reset Gloo's 1st Skill, allowing him to use it again to deal damage.
data.title: LANING COMBOS

data.desc: For teamfights, we recommend using Bennett as Beatrix's primary weapon and Nibiru as her secondary weapon. During a teamfight, Beatrix can use Bennett's Ultimate to strike the enemy team. Then she can use her 1st Skill to switch to Nibiru, and cast Nibiru's Ultimate to attack the enemy. She can finish off the enemy heroes with her Basic Attacks and her 2nd Skill.
data.title: TEAMFIGHT COMBOS

data.desc: In the laning phase, we recommend using Renner as Beatrix's primary weapon and Wesker as her secondary weapon. She can use Renner's ranged Basic Attack to poke the enemy, and her 2nd Skill to reload and fire again. She can then switch to Wesker to finish off the target enemy.
data.title: LANING COMBOS

data.desc: In teamfights, Phoveus should use his enhanced Basic Attack to charge at the enemy while knocking them back and marking them. Then immediately follow up with his Ultimate. Next, hit the target with his 1st Skill, then use his 2nd skill and his Ultimate again. Finally, use the enhanced 1st Skill to mark the enemy once more, and use his Ultimate.
data.title: TEAMFIGHT COMBOS

data.desc: In the laning phase, Phoveus should first use his enhanced Basic Attack to hit the enemy hero and gain a shield. Follow up with his 1st Skill to chip away their HP, then use his enhanced 1st Skill for additional damage and to slow the target, and end with his 2nd Skill for more damage.
data.title: LANING COMBOS

data.desc: In teamfights, summon a Reverse-Clone with Natan's Ultimate, then use his 2nd Skill followed by his 1st Skill to knockback and damage enemies, and finish with a barrage of Basic Attacks. Depending on the situation, Natan's Ultimate can also be used to chase or escape.
data.title: TEAMFIGHT COMBOS

data.desc: In the laning phase, use Natan's 1st Skill and Basic Attacks to chip away at the enemy. When their HP is low enough, use his 2nd Skill to knockback the enemy and finish them off with Basic Attacks.
data.title: LANING COMBOS

data.desc: In teamfights, use Aulus's 1st Skill to gain Movement Speed and Control Immunity to quickly enter the fray. Use his 2nd Skill's second cast to get onto key targets, then activate his Ultimate and stay on them for continuous damage. Finally, use his enhanced Basic Attacks to clean up the battlefield.
data.title: TEAMFIGHT COMBOS

data.desc: When ganking in the early game, use Aulus's 1st Skill for Movement Speed and Control Immunity to quickly close in on the target. Then, use his 2nd Skill to slow them while weaving in Basic Attacks. Use his 2nd Skill again to stay on the target, and activate his Ultimate to chase while dealing damage, then finish them off with his enhanced Basic Attacks.
data.title: JUNGLER COMBOS

data.desc: Use 2nd Skill to Camouflage and flank the enemy. Deal damage with his 1st Skill and Basic Attacks, and Ultimate to take out backline heroes.
data.title: TEAMFIGHT COMBOS

data.desc: Use his skills and Enhanced Basic Attacks for very high jungling efficiency.
data.title: LANING COMBOS

data.desc: Copy an Ultimate or use 2nd Skill for better positioning. Use 1st Skill and reset its cooldown with 2nd Skill, then Terrify the target and use her copied Ultimate to secure the kill.
data.title: TEAMFIGHT COMBOS

data.desc: Use 1st Skill to poke, then 2nd Skill to refresh its CD, and 1st Skill on the same enemy again to cause Terrify.
data.title: LANING COMBOS

data.desc:
In teamfights, use Edith's 2nd Skill to toss the enemy behind her, followed by her 1st Skill to knock them airborne then immediately use her Ultimate.
Now use Edith's 2nd Skill in human form to immobilize the target, followed by her 1st Skill for more damage, and secure the kill with enhanced Basic Attacks.
data.title: TEAMFIGHT COMBOS

data.desc:
In the laning phase, use Edith's 2nd Skill to toss the enemy behind her,
then use her 1st Skill to knock them airborne
and finish them off with enhanced Basic Attacks from her Passive.
data.title: LANING COMBOS

data.desc: In teamfights, use Floryn's 2nd Skill to CC enemies, and her 1st Skill for damage and healing. When a teammate is in bad shape, use Floryn's Ultimate to save them.
data.title: TEAMFIGHT COMBOS

data.desc: In the laning phase, use Floryn's 2nd Skill to stun enemies, then follow up with her 1st Skill for damage and healing.
data.title: LANING COMBOS

data.desc: Yin should use his 1st Skill to gain Movement Speed and then his 2nd Skill to get close to a key enemy and hit them with his enhanced Basic Attack before trapping them in his Ultimate. In Lieh form, use his 2nd Skill to stun the enemy and finish them off with his 1st Skill.
data.title: TEAMFIGHT COMBOS

data.desc: In the laning phase, Yin should use his 1st Skill to gain Movement Speed, then use his 2nd Skill to dash behind the enemy so the Golden Rings will stun them on their return, and end with his enhanced Basic Attack.
data.title: LANING COMBOS

data.desc:
Link enemies with her 2nd Skill for increased damage.
Use 1st Skill to keep them linked and her Ultimate
to stop enemies from getting close.
data.title: TEAMFIGHT COMBOS

data.desc:
Link the enemy with her 2nd Skill and use
Basic Attacks to deal extra damage. 
Chase enemies trying to flee with her 1st Skill.
data.title: LANING COMBOS

data.desc: Cast Xavier's Ultimate to enter or refresh Transcendence, then try to hit as many enemies as possible with his 2nd Skill, and follow up with his 1st Skill to create a forbidden field to immobilize enemies. Continue casting his 1st Skill to extend Transcendence's duration while going for kills.
data.title: TEAMFIGHT COMBOS

data.desc: In the laning phase, Xavier possesses great poke with his 1st Skill and can utilize the slow from his 2nd Skill to make targets easier to hit. This combination allows him to quickly reach Transcendence. When the opportunity arises, use his Ultimate to finish off an enemy and while in Transcendence state.
data.title: LANING COMBOS

data.desc: In teamfights, Julian can slow the enemy with his 1st Skill before dashing into the enemy battle formation with his 2nd Skill. Then use his enhanced 3rd Skill for area CC.
data.title: TEAMFIGHT COMBOS

data.desc: In the laning phase, Julian can use his 2nd Skill to close in on the enemy, and his 3rd Skill to immobilize them. Then he can use his enhanced 1st Skill to deal damage. Follow up with his enhanced Basic Attacks to prevent the enemy from escaping.
data.title: LANING COMBOS

data.desc: In teamfights, Fredrinn should use his 2nd Skill to close in on the enemy hero and knock them airborne, then use his 1st Skill and 1st Ultimate for CC and cooldown reset. Use his enhanced Basic Attacks, 1st and 2nd skills sequentially to deal heavy damage, and finish with his 2nd Ultimate after knocking the enemy airborne for the kill.
data.title: TEAMFIGHT COMBOS

data.desc: In the laning phase, Fredrinn can dash to the enemy hero with his 2nd Skill, and knock that hero airborne with the enhanced Basic Attack. Then follow up with his 1st Skill to deal damage.
data.title: LANING COMBOS

data.desc: In teamfights, Joy should summon a Leonin Crystal with her 1st Skill and use it as a springboard for her 2nd Skill to enter the battle. Continue to chain her 2nd Skill on the beat to unlock her Ultimate. Finally, use her Ultimate to finish off the enemy.
data.title: TEAMFIGHT COMBOS

data.desc: In the laning phase, Joy should place her 1st Skill on top of the enemy, then use her 2nd Skill to dash through both targets and continue to chain her 2nd Skill on the beat for damage.
data.title: LANING COMBOS

data.desc: In teamfights, use Novaria's Ultimate to gain vision of the battlefield, then summon an Astral Sphere with her 2nd Skill. After catching the Astral Sphere, launch it to damage the enemy and use her 1st Skill to thwart enemy heroes that try to get close.
data.title: TEAMFIGHT COMBOS

data.desc: In the laning phase, initiate by using Novaria's 2nd Skill to gain extra Movement Speed and summon an Astral Sphere. Then, slow the enemy with her 1st Skill and use her 2nd Skill again to launch the Astral Sphere to deal damage.
data.title: LANING COMBOS

data.desc: In teamfights, start by hitting a marked enemy hero with Arlott's 2nd Skill, then get into position to unleash his Ultimate on the enemy team to CC and mark them. Use Arlott's 2nd Skill to cut through the enemy from target to target. When all marks have been used up, use his 1st Skill to CC and mark enemies again, and continue to chain his 2nd Skill.
data.title: TEAMFIGHT COMBOS

data.desc: In the laning phase, after Arlott's Passive marks an enemy hero, use his 2nd Skill to dash through them and get a cooldown reset. Follow up with his 1st Skill to CC the enemy and mark them again, then hit them with his 2nd Skill while resetting its cooldown.
data.title: LANING COMBOS

data.desc: Choose the perfect location that can secure herself and cast the Ultimate to rain down her attacks on as many enemies as possible. Keep tapping Basic Attack while using her 2nd Skill and 1st Skill to control enemies and deal extra damage.
data.title: TEAMFIGHT COMBOS

data.desc: Ixia can pull enemies to the center line with her 2nd Skill and follow up with her 1st Skill to deal damage. Use the Movement Speed boost provided by her 1st Skill to chase down enemies.
data.title: LANING COMBOS

data.desc: In teamfights, approach the enemy using Nolan's 2nd Skill and enhanced Basic Attack, then activate the rift with his 1st Skill. Use Nolan's 2nd Skill to dash through the enemy, and unleash his Ultimate to activate all the rifts while dashing back to safety.
data.title: TEAMFIGHT COMBOS

data.desc: In the laning phase, use Nolan's 2nd Skill and enhanced Basic Attack to catch the enemy, then use his 1st Skill to activate the rift. Follow up with his 2nd Skill into his 1st Skill to activate another rift explosion.
data.title: LANING COMBOS

data.desc: In teamfights, find two enemy heroes that are close together and toss Cici's Ultimate on one of them, then use her 2nd Skill to jump in and pop her 1st Skill mid-leap to start dealing continuous damage.
data.title: TEAMFIGHT COMBOS

data.desc: In the laning phase, use Cici's Basic Attacks to stack some Delight before using her 1st Skill on the opponent, and use her 2nd Skill if they attempt an escape.
data.title: LANING COMBOS

data.desc: In teamfights, use Chip's 2nd Skill preemptively to build up speed, then hit a target with his Basic Attack and deploy the Main Portal with his Ultimate. Follow up with his 1st Skill on the enemy and another Basic Attack to stun them while the Main Portal's delayed effect slows them, and continue the fight as allies portal in.
data.title: TEAMFIGHT COMBOS

data.desc: When ganking, use Chip's 2nd Skill to quickly get behind the target and knock them into your team with the enhanced Basic Attack, then follow up with his 1st Skill and another Basic Attack to stun them.
data.title: LANING COMBOS

data.desc: In the laning phase, use Zhuxin's 1st Skill to slow the opponent and increase her own Movement Speed, then use her 2nd Skill from a safe position and try to hit the Minions and the opponent at the same time to both poke and clear the lane. Once the enemy has enough stacks, throw them into the Minions for additional damage.
data.title: LANING COMBOS

data.desc: In teamfights, use Zhuxin's Ultimate to blink into a good position, then follow up with her 1st Skill to slow the enemy team and use her 2nd Skill to build stacks at a safe distance. Try to capture as many enemies as possible with her 2nd Skill, then throw them out of position while also grouping them up.
data.title: TEAMFIGHT COMBOS

data.desc: Hold-cast Skill 3 to poke before the team fight, then hold-cast Skill 1 to engage and control the enemy at their back, then hold-cast Skill 2 to deal massive damage. Then tap-cast Skill 3 to keep your distance from the enemy, and when the skill cooldown is up, tap-cast Skill 1 and Skill 2 to quickly kill the target.
data.title: TEAMFIGHT COMBOS

data.desc: Hold-casting Skill 1 in the Bush allows Suyou to attack unexpectedly and control the enemy; then hold-cast Skill 2 to deal massive damage and follow up the Basic Attack by tap-casting Skill 3 to leave the battlefield.
data.title: LANING COMBOS

data.desc: Lukas should use his 2nd Skill to close in on the enemy, then use the enhanced Basic Attack plus another Basic Attack to get 2 stacks of Vigor. Now use his fully powered 1st Skill to inflict high damage and stun and displace the target, then back off to avoid the enemy's counterattack.
data.title: LANING COMBOS

data.desc: In Sacred Beast form, use Lukas's 2nd Skill followed by an enhanced Basic Attack, then another Basic Attack to get 2 stacks of Vigor. Use his 1st Skill to inflict high damage and CC, and finish off with Shockwave Blast to devastate the enemy with a massive AOE attack.
data.title: TEAMFIGHT COMBOS

data.desc: While ganking with Kalea, use her 2nd Skill to close in and CC the target, then use her 1st Skill to activate her enhanced Basic Attacks and unleash them on the target.
data.title: Laning Combos

data.desc: In teamfights, Kalea should prioritize enemy Mages or Marksmen. Use the first part of her 2nd Skill to dash into an obstacle near the target, then dive down to CC them, and follow up with her Ultimate to slam them into your team. Use her 1st Skill to trigger her Passive, and unload her enhanced Basic Attacks on the target.
data.title: Teamfight Combos

data.desc: In teamfights, use Zetian's Ultimate to boost her team's Movement Speed and launch the global attack, then immediately use her 2nd Skill to slow enemies, making it easier for the Ultimate to land. Follow-up with her 1st Skill for more AoE, and recast the 2nd Skill if enemies try to leave its range.
data.title: Teamfight Combos

data.desc: In the laning phase, Use Zetian's 2nd Skill to slow the enemy and reduce their Magic Defense, then use her 1st Skill while moving to reposition and deal sustained damage. If enemies leave the area of the 2nd Skill, use it again to move the Phoenix on top of them.
data.title: Laning Combos

data.desc: During teamfights, use Obsidia's Basic Attacks and 1st Skill to poke the enemy, and her 2nd Skill to reposition herself. Look for opportunities to close in on a target with her Ultimate and pick them off with your team. Finally, use her mobility and powerful Basic Attacks to clean up the remaining enemies.
data.title: TEAMFIGHT COMBOS

data.desc: During the laning phase, use Obsidia's 1st Skill often on enemy Minions and heroes to quickly stack her Passive. When the enemy's HP drops low enough, use Obsidia's 2nd Skill and Ultimate on them and finish them off with Basic Attacks.
data.title: Laning Combos

data.desc: In mid-to-late game teamfights, Sora is able to adapt to different situations. He can ascend to Thunder form to dive the enemy backline, or Torrent form to become a CC machine and take control of the battlefield.
data.title: TEAMFIGHT COMBOS

data.desc: When the opponent is focused on clearing Minions, poke them with Sora's 1st Skill, then use his 2nd Skill to create distance. Use the mobility from his 1st and 2nd Skill to effectively kite enemies. Sora's damage is reliant on hitting with his 1st Skill.
data.title: LANING COMBOS

data.desc: In teamfights, Marcel should activate his 2nd Skill, followed by his 1st Skill. Run into the enemy's formation, then use the 2nd Skill again to dash away and drop his 1st Skill on top of them. Once the enemies are immobilized, use his Ultimate.
data.title: TEAMFIGHT COMBOS

data.desc: During the laning phase, use Marcel's 2nd Skill to run up to the enemy and cast his 1st Skill. While the enemy is immobilized, lay into them with Basic Attacks.
data.title: LANING COMBOS

data.desc: In the laning phase, use Hirara's 1st Skill to close in, then use a 1st + 2nd Combo Skill to immobilize the target. Follow up with a 2nd + 1st Combo Skill to deal heavy damage and dash away to safety.
data.title: JUNGLER COMBOS

data.desc: In teamfights, wait for the enemy backline to become isolated and use Hirara's 1st Skill to dive in. Use a 1st + 2nd Combo Skill to deal damage and apply CC, then follow up with a 2nd + 1st Combo Skill to burst the target down and dash out of the enemy formation. Finally, use her 2nd Skill to deal additional damage.
data.title: TEAMFIGHT COMBOS
